mechanism_narrative: A persistently near-zero federal funds rate lowers the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, mechanically supporting equity valuations. As long as FEDFUNDS remains below 0.25%, forward S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days should skew positive relative to historical baseline.
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS level and forward 20d SPX return falls below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year window, or mean forward return during FEDFUNDS<0.25% periods is not statistically greater than unconditional mean (p>0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE is elevated above 7% but has stopped rising for at least two consecutive monthly readings, this signals labor market bottoming, which historically precedes equity market recovery over a quarterly horizon as forward earnings expectations improve.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE > 7% and month-over-month change <= 0 for 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: In triggered instances, 60-day forward SPX returns are negative in more than 50% of cases, or Rank IC < 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month acceleration in INDPRO reflects improving industrial output that feeds directly into near-term corporate revenue expectations, producing a short-horizon positive drift in S&P 500 prices over the following week.
failure_condition: Correlation between INDPRO monthly change and next 5-day SPX return is not significantly different from zero (p>0.10) across full sample, or sign hit-rate <= 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month increases in HOUST and RSAFS indicate a synchronized rebound in construction activity and consumer spending, jointly signaling broad-based demand recovery that individual series alone do not capture, driving positive forward returns over one month.
candidate_trigger: HOUST MoM > 0 and RSAFS MoM > 0 simultaneously
failure_condition: Joint-trigger 20-day forward return distribution is not statistically different from the distribution when only one series rises (t-test p>0.05), indicating no genuine interaction effect.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is pinned near zero while PAYEMS shows sequential monthly gains, the combination signals that accommodative policy is beginning to translate into labor market healing, a joint condition historically associated with sustained multi-quarter equity rallies.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS < 0.25% and PAYEMS rising for 3 consecutive months
regime_hint: zero interest rate policy regime with labor recovery
failure_condition: Conditional on joint trigger, 60-day forward SPX Sharpe ratio is not higher than unconditional Sharpe ratio, or Rank IC < 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month PAYEMS reading that turns positive after two or more months of decline marks a payroll trough, which forward-looking equity markets price in advance of confirmed macro recovery, producing positive 20-day returns.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS MoM change turns positive after >=2 prior months of decline
failure_condition: Hit-rate of positive 20-day SPX returns following the trigger falls below 55% over out-of-sample validation, or Rank IC < 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A quarter-over-quarter deceleration in GDPC1 growth below its trailing 4-quarter average signals weakening aggregate demand, which forward equity markets discount over the following quarter as earnings growth expectations are revised downward.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 QoQ annualized growth falls below trailing 4-quarter average by more than 1pp
failure_condition: In triggered quarters, forward 60-day SPX returns are positive in more than 55% of cases, or Rank IC magnitude < 0.03 over rolling samples.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL year-over-year inflation exceeds FEDFUNDS, implying deeply negative real short rates, financial repression incentivizes capital rotation into equities as a real-return hedge, supporting positive S&P 500 returns over a monthly horizon; this effect requires the joint state of both series, not either alone.
failure_condition: Conditional mean 20-day forward return under the negative-real-rate trigger is not significantly greater than the unconditional mean (p>0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 across rolling 2-year windows.
